headline: Enzo Fernandez
body: Argentina come from 2-0 down with 11 minutes left to beat Egypt 3-2 and reach the QFs. Enzo Fernandez with the injury-time winner. Lionel Messi also among the scorers. Now nine straight World Cup games he has scored in, and 125 goals for Argentina.🇦🇷
raw_text:
Argentina come from 2-0 down with 11 minutes left to beat Egypt 3-2 and reach the QFs. Enzo Fernandez with the injury-time winner.

Lionel Messi also among the scorers. Now nine straight World Cup games he has scored in, and 125 goals for Argentina.🇦🇷
text:
Argentina come from 2-0 down with 11 minutes left to beat Egypt 3-2 and reach the QFs. Enzo Fernandez with the injury-time winner.

Lionel Messi also among the scorers. Now nine straight World Cup games he has scored in, and 125 goals for Argentina.🇦🇷
